items.title: McDonald's McNugget Caviar Push And New Leaders Shape Brand Story
items.description: McDonald's (NYSE:MCD) is rolling out limited-time McNugget Caviar kits around Valentine's Day, pairing its chicken nuggets with a premium caviar brand. The company is using this fast food and luxury mash up to spark social media attention and drive customer engagement. Alongside the promotion, McDonald's announced leadership changes that include executive promotions and retirements. For investors watching NYSE:MCD, this news sits alongside a share price of $327.16 and multi year returns...
